Applicable SOPs: Template is not currently referenced within any SOPs
Text: UK/IE XDP: XDP will contact you 3-5 business days after the item ships to arrange delivery. By the morning of the scheduled delivery, you will receive a text message with a 2-hour time slot. Delivery is to a room of your choice, including up to one flight of stairs. Panther: Panther will deliver to a room of your choice within 2 flights of stairs. Expect a confirmation text or email the day before delivery with a 2-hour delivery window (between 7am and 8pm). They will call 60 minutes prior to delivery. If you miss your delivery, 3 reattempts will be made and they will call you directly to rebook this. XPO: XPO will call 1 hour before arrival and deliver to your room of choice up to 3 flights of stairs. You should receive a text message on the day of delivery with a link to live tracking. XPO will remove and dispose of packaging material upon request.

Applicable SOPs: Template is not currently referenced within any SOPs
Text: UK/IE XDP: XDP delivery will be scheduled between 8am and 8pm to your front door. A text with a 2-hour time slot will be sent by the morning of delivery. BJS: BJS will send a proposed delivery date via text or email 3-5 business days after the item ships, which you'll need to confirm. You’ll receive a 3-hour time slot the day before delivery and a 30-minute heads-up call prior to delivery to your front door. If missed, BJS will contact you to reschedule. Panther: Panther delivery will occur between 7am and 8pm to your front door. Expect a confirmation text or email the day before delivery with a 2-hour delivery window. They will call 60 minutes prior to delivery. If you miss your delivery, 3 reattempts will be made and they will call you directly to rebook this. WDN: WDN delivery will be made to your front door Monday-Friday between 8am and 8pm, within a 3-hour window confirmed via email. The delivery will be booked for the first business day after the order ships unless you have requested an alternative day. You will receive reminders the day before and morning of delivery, plus a final message when the driver is 1 stop away. They will make 3 delivery attempts in total and you can reschedule yourself twice through the tracking portal.

Applicable SOPs: Template is not currently referenced within any SOPs
Text: UK/IE DHL: DHL will deliver to your front door between 7am and 6pm. On the day of delivery, you'll receive a 1-hour window via text or email, including a link to track your order and sign up for notifications when the driver is one stop away. If missed, three delivery attempts will be made. You can request the item be left with a neighbour, in a safe place, or collected from a nearby DHL shop. Delivery can be rescheduled if available. DPD: On the morning of the delivery, you'll receive a text or email from DPD with a 1-hour window. If you miss the delivery, you'll receive a message with information on where you can collect the item. If available, you can request delivery on a specific day by clicking the link and logging in to the DPD site. Certain delivery requests may incur an additional cost. Evri: Evri will deliver to your front door between 8am and 8pm. On the day of the delivery, you'll receive an email with a two-hour time slot. If you miss the delivery, a digital calling card will be sent to you in an email advising on when the next attempt will be made. Should Evri not have your email address, they will leave a physical calling card with you. There will be a total of 3 delivery attempts made. UPS: UPS will deliver to your front door between 9am and 7pm. If missed, you’ll receive a card with options to reschedule or collect from a UPS Access Point. Sign up for UPS My Choice to manage delivery changes, including date, location, or neighbour drop-off.
